final:
module RefModule(
    input D, 
    input C, 
    input R, 
    input S, 
    output reg Q  // Changed from output to output reg
    );  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge C or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (R) begin
            Q <= 0;
        end else if (S) begin
            Q <= 1;
        end else begin
            Q <= D;
        end
    end

endmodule
